title: bare pvp
description: barebones + pvp overlay + sum quality of life mods
body:
Bare pvp is the result of about a month of work, this is just my personal modpack that i use on a daily basis, and this is has all the different optimization mods, qol mods, and some pvp mods, including the pvp overlay that theothebaldbird made, and is really good. This does include barebones, and if you dont like the look of barebones, just turn it off, but the pvp overlay does require barebones to function. A huge thanks to both Robot Pants and theothebaldbird, for making said texturepacks, they are really usefull, and if you wish support them and not me!

Anyway here is the pvp overlay: [THEOTHEBALDBIRD IS GOATED](https://www.patreon.com/posts/barebones-pvp-1-125405270)

version like meaning and stuf:

first digit: the like total mod versions, so like if i start a compleatly new modpack instead of building on the one that i hav currently, then it will be 2.blah.blah

second digit: the version of the current modpack

hyphen + third digit + fourth digit: the mc version num

and

i replaced the og icon becuase i made it with ai and i didnt like it that much so i just took a random template from canva and edited it and stuf so its good ig. thats ir rlly.

also 

I AM NOT ALLIFIEATED WITH OR THEOTHEBALDBIRD OR ROBOT PANTS THIS IS JUST MY PERSONAL MODPACK THAT I WANTED TO SHARE WITH PEOPLE I AM NOT GONNA MAKE MONEY OFF THIS, EVEN IF I DO GET SOME DOWNLOADS I WILL NOT WITHDRAW I PROMISE THAT TO YOU GUYS
